records.ety: [L. principalitas preëminence, excellence: cf. F. principalit, principaut. See Principal.]

defs: Sovereignty; supreme power; hence, superiority; predominance; high, or the highest, station.
quotes: Your principalities shall come down, even the crown of your glory.
The prerogative and principality above everything else.

defs: A prince; one invested with sovereignty.
The territory or jurisdiction of a prince; or the country which gives title to a prince; as, the principality of Wales.
